title: fix: use audio emoji for STT models on pricing page
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Sounds about right
gist.blurb: We were using a movie clapper icon for audio models. A bit dramatic for a transcript, right? Swapped it for a speaker so the pricing page makes sense.
gist.summary: Updated the pricing page UI to display the correct speaker emoji for audio and speech-to-text models instead of the video clapper icon.
gist.impact: Clearer distinction between video and audio pricing tiers for users browsing model costs.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee correcting a labeling mistake. She is swapping a movie clapperboard for a speaker icon on a pricing board. Represents the UI fix.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing headphones, placing a pixelated speaker icon 🔊 onto a lime green (#ecf874) pricing board. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
